scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm deploy:staging:check && pnpm deploy:staging:backend && pnpm deploy:staging:frontend && pnpm deploy:staging:firebase
scripts.deploy:staging:check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build
scripts.deploy:staging:backend: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; PROJECT=muga-staging; REGION=europe-west1; TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)}; IMAGE=$REGION-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT/muga/muga-backend:$TAG; gcloud builds submit --project=$PROJECT --config=cloudbuild.backend-staging.yaml --substitutions=_IMAGE=$IMAGE .; gcloud run deploy muga-backend --project=$PROJECT --region=$REGION --image=$IMAGE --service-account=muga-backend@$PROJECT.iam.gserviceaccount.com --allow-unauthenticated --port=8080 --cpu=1 --memory=512Mi --max-instances=5 --set-env-vars="^@^NODE_ENV=production@FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=$PROJECT@FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=muga-staging-cover-art@SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT=staging@CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://muga-staging.web.app,https://muga-frontend-438419642765.europe-west1.run.app@ALERT_READY_LATENCY_BUDGET_MS=2000@EXPERIMENTAL_ROLE_SWITCH_ENABLED=true" --set-secrets="SENTRY_DSN=sentry-dsn-backend:latest,SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=slack-webhook-url:latest,INITIAL_ADMIN_EMAILS=initial-admin-emails:latest"'
scripts.deploy:staging:frontend: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; PROJECT=muga-staging; REGION=europe-west1; TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)}; IMAGE=$REGION-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT/muga/muga-frontend:$TAG; SENTRY_DSN=$(gcloud secrets versions access latest --secret=sentry-dsn-frontend --project=$PROJECT); gcloud builds submit --project=$PROJECT --config=cloudbuild.frontend-staging.yaml --substitutions=_IMAGE=$IMAGE,_APP_VERSION=$TAG,_FIREBASE_API_KEY=AIzaSyDXT-A5PCyAW39kK8LLNWeUKEaGeEWlrio,_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:438419642765:web:64ee9c4956469a129945c4,_SENTRY_DSN=$SENTRY_DSN .; gcloud run deploy muga-frontend --project=$PROJECT --region=$REGION --image=$IMAGE --allow-unauthenticated --port=8080 --cpu=1 --memory=512Mi --max-instances=5 --set-env-vars="NODE_ENV=production,FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=$PROJECT,SESSION_COOKIE_NAME=__session,API_URL=https://muga-backend-438419642765.europe-west1.run.app/api,NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://muga-staging.web.app/api,NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=$PROJECT"'
scripts.deploy:staging:firebase: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; gcloud storage buckets update gs://muga-staging-cover-art --cors-file=storage-cors.staging.json; npx -y firebase-tools@latest deploy --only hosting:app,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,storage --project muga-staging --non-interactive'
